tests.test_name: Espresso - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a single Espresso test file receives properly structured documentation output with no missing or unresolved content.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing the uploaded test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or unfilled fields remain in the downloaded output
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Espresso
At least one test case is represented in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case is assigned a readable name

tests.test_name: Espresso - PO - Parameterized data-driven expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that when a Product Owner uploads a data-driven Espresso test file, each data row is expanded into its own individual test entry in the output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing the data-driven test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or unfilled fields remain in the downloaded output
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Espresso
Data rows are expanded so that each row results in a separate test entry, producing at least 3 tests

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test case is assigned a readable name

tests.test_name: Espresso - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a single Espresso test file receives output that includes a populated test coverage matrix alongside the standard documentation.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing the uploaded test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or unfilled fields remain in the downloaded output
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Espresso
At least one test case is represented in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test case is assigned a readable name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that when a QA Manager uploads a data-driven Espresso test file, all data rows are collapsed into a single test entry with a coverage matrix that reflects each data row using the correct Espresso schema.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing the data-driven test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or unfilled fields remain in the downloaded output
The output correctly identifies the test framework as Espresso
Data rows are collapsed so the output contains a single test entry rather than one per row

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test case is assigned a readable name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage matrix contains one row for each data example, preserving full data-driven traceability

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'espresso'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row follows the expected Espresso-specific structure and field format
